zh.of, Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格爾
zh.Stoke Bishop, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾斯托克 畢曉普

zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Despenser於1290年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾斯托克 畢曉普時，他的父親Hugh le Despenser 1st Earl of Winchester29歲，母親Lady Isabella de Beauchamp42歲。他於大約1312年與Margaret Goushill在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1313年9月24日在英國林可爾史爾格爾享年23歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.of, Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾格爾
zh-hans.Stoke Bishop, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾斯托克 畢曉普
zh-hans.Elmley Castle, Wychavon District, Worces: 英国武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Despenser于1290年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾斯托克 畢曉普时，他的父亲Hugh le Despenser 1st Earl of Winchester29岁，母亲Lady Isabella de Beauchamp42岁。他于大约1312年与Margaret Goushill在英国英格兰林可爾史爾格爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1313年9月24日在英国林可爾史爾格爾享年23岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Despenser was born in 1290, in Stoke Bishop, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Hugh le Despenser 1st Earl of Winchester, was 29 and his mother, Lady Isabella de Beauchamp, was 42. He married Margaret Goushill about 1312, in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 24 September 1313, in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 23, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Despenser est né en 1290, à Stoke Bishop, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh le Despenser 1st Earl of Winchester, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabella de Beauchamp, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Goushill environ 1312, à Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1313, à Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Despenser 1290 in Stoke Bishop, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh le Despenser 1st Earl of Winchester 29 und seine Mutter Lady Isabella de Beauchamp 42. Er hat um 1312 in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Goushill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 24. September 1313 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Despenser è nato il nel 1290 nel Stoke Bishop, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Hugh le Despenser 1st Earl of Winchester, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabella de Beauchamp, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Goushill circa 1312, nel Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 24 settembre 1313, nel Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアゴクスヒル

ja.lifeSummary: Philip Despenserが1290年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアストク ビショップで生まれた時，父Hugh le Despenser 1st Earl of Winchesterは29歳，母Lady Isabella de Beauchampは42歳であった。約1312年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアゴクスヒルでMargaret Goushillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1313年9月24日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアゴクスヒルで23歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip Despenser(이)가 1290년 영국 그루스스터실르 스토크 비숍에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh le Despenser 1st Earl of Winchester(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabella de Beauchamp(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 고스힐에서 Margaret Goushill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1313년 9월 24일 영국 링코실르 고스힐에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

mn.of, Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England: Goxhill, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Despenser nasceu em 1290, em Stoke Bishop, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh le Despenser 1st Earl of Winchester, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabella de Beauchamp, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Goushill aproximadamente 1312, em Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1313, em Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 23 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Despenser родился в 1290 г. в местности сток бишоп, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh le Despenser 1st Earl of Winchester было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabella de Beauchamp, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Goushill около 1312 г. в местности гоксхилл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 24 сентября 1313 г. в местности гоксхилл, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 23 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip Despenser nació en 1290, en Stoke Bishop, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh le Despenser 1st Earl of Winchester, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Isabella de Beauchamp, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Margaret Goushill aproximadamente 1312, en Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1313, en Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 23 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
